title: BootstrapDoctorReport
description: Schema for the machine-readable JSON output of bootstrap_doctor.py --json. This is the stable contract for downstream tooling. Do not rely on human-readable terminal output for automation.

schema_version.description: Version of this JSON schema contract. Follows semver: patch = additive/clarifying changes; minor = new optional fields; major = renamed/removed required fields or changed semantics.

target_dir.description: Absolute path to the target repository that was inspected.

bootstrapped.description: True if a bootstrap marker file (bootstrap/BOOTSTRAP_SOURCE.md) was found in the target repository.

marker_status.description: Classification of the bootstrap marker file completeness. 'missing' = no marker found; 'incomplete' = marker present but core fields are absent or still placeholders; 'present' = marker found with core fields filled.

marker_era.description: Era classification of the bootstrap marker, derived from the version and profile fields recorded. 'pre-version' = no semver version recorded; 'pre-profile' = semver present but no profile; 'versioned' = both semver version and profile recorded; 'unknown' = version field present but unrecognized format.

recorded_version.description: Bootstrap source version recorded in the marker (semver string), or null if absent or still a placeholder.

source_version.description: Current bootstrap source repository version read from the VERSION file, or null if unreadable.

recorded_profile.description: Bootstrap profile recorded in the marker, or null if absent or still a placeholder.

suggested_profile.description: Profile suggested by heuristic analysis of the target repository file structure.

profile_confidence.description: Confidence level of the profile suggestion. 'high' = strong multiple signals; 'medium' = moderate evidence; 'low' = weak or ambiguous evidence.

profile_alignment.description: Alignment between the recorded marker profile and the currently suggested profile. 'aligned' = they match; 'mismatch' = they differ with sufficient evidence; 'insufficient-evidence' = suggestion confidence too low to classify mismatch; 'not-recorded' = no profile in the marker.

required_files_status.description: Classification of required managed-file presence. 'all-present' = no required files missing; 'minor-gaps' = 1–2 files missing; 'major-gaps' = 3 or more files missing.

missing_files.description: List of required managed files that are absent from the target repository.

placeholder_status.description: Classification of unfilled {{PLACEHOLDER}} presence across managed files. 'placeholders-remain' = all checked files still have placeholders; 'no-placeholders-detected' = no placeholders found in any checked file; 'mixed' = some files populated, some still have placeholders.

files_with_placeholders.description: List of managed files that still contain unfilled {{PLACEHOLDER}} markers.

total_placeholder_count.description: Total number of unfilled placeholder instances found across all checked managed files.

health_state.description: Overall bootstrap health classification. These six values are the stable vocabulary — do not rename without a semver minor version bump.

recommendations.description: Structured recommended next actions for the operator. Each item is either a runnable command or an informational note.

Recommendation.description: A single recommended next action. Use 'type' to distinguish runnable commands from informational notes without string parsing.

type.description: 'command' = a shell command the operator can run directly; 'note' = informational guidance that is not directly executable.

value.description: The command string or note text.
